pending_cards.QM5_1457_as-predict-bonds: Blocked by card-required Treasury-yield/IEF/BIL/DBC inputs that are not DWX instruments; the farm task already records non_dwx_rates_inputs_required_by_card.
pending_cards.QM5_1459_as-lumber-gold: Blocked by unavailable lumber and IEF inputs; the card body retains R3 UNKNOWN.
pending_cards.QM5_13031_wayward-bbrsi-stopmr: Approved but restricted to XAU/NDX, the already saturated metal/index cohort.

priority_1_audit.fallback_used: Repair the highest-value collision-free, price-native FX EA with only Q02 infrastructure failures.

selection.label: QM5_12357_tmom-fx-hp
selection.mechanism: Fixed-lambda Hodrick-Prescott trend-state filter with price confirmation, signal-reversal exit, and ATR hard stop.
selection.source: ThewindMom/151-trading-strategies, Strategy 8.1 FX Moving Averages, src/strategies/fx/fx_moving_averages.py

farm_claim.collision_guard: No open Q02/Q03 work item, economic verdict, downstream row, or competing task existed when the claim was acquired.

diagnosis.failure_evidence: All 84 retained Q02 attempts ended INFRA_FAIL, predominantly summary_missing_retries_exhausted, without an economic verdict.
package_defects: The EX5 and generated setfiles were stale relative to the current framework contract.
All setfiles used slot 0, retained build_hash=pending, and omitted the EA and strategy input contract.
News filtering defaulted on and ran before management, exits, and the D1 bar latch, introducing an entry-calendar dependency into core strategy lifecycle processing.
The HP signal was recomputed inside entry processing while reversal exits depended on stale signal state.
diagnosis.scope: Package-local repair only; no shared framework, registry, portfolio gate, or live configuration change.

changes: Cache one completed-D1-bar HP signal for management, neutral/opposite-signal exits, and entry.
Run Friday handling, strategy management, and hard exits before entry-only news gating.
Default news temporal/compliance modes off for this price-native card while preserving explicit configurable inputs.
Restrict the exit loop to the host symbol and framework magic.
Regenerate seven canonical D1 backtest setfiles with allocated slots 0-6, complete strategy defaults, RISK_FIXED=1000, RISK_PERCENT=0, and non-pending build hashes.
Rebuild the final EX5 from a detached clean-HEAD framework snapshot so unrelated shared-worktree include edits cannot enter the binary.

clean_snapshot_build_check.current_head_delta_note: The only commits added after the clean snapshot and before evidence creation changed unrelated artifacts/docs, not framework includes.

smoke.interpretation: Runtime and deterministic trade-generation evidence only; Q02 owns the full-history economic verdict.

q02_handoff.duplicate_guard: Exactly three open rows exist for QM5_12357 after the guarded transaction; the latest terminal INFRA_FAIL row for each FX carrier was reset in place, so no row was inserted.
